name: Berserker
text: Gain a card costing less than this. Each other player discards down to 3 cards in hand. | When you gain this, if you have an Action in play, play this.

name: Border Village
text: +1 Card +2 Actions | When you gain this, gain a cheaper card.

name: Cache
text: (3) | When you gain this, gain 2 Coppers.

name: Cartographer
text: +1 Card +1 Action Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them, then put the rest back in any order.

name: Cauldron
text: (2) +1 Buy The third time you gain an Action this turn, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Crossroads
text: Reveal your hand. +1 Card per Victory card revealed. If this is the first time you played a Crossroads this turn, +3 Actions.

name: Develop
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain two cards onto your deck, with one costing exactly (1) more than it, and one costing exactly (1) less than it, in either order.

name: Duchess
text: +(2) Each player (including you) looks at the top card of their deck and may discard it. | In games using this, when you gain a Duchy, you may gain a Duchess.

name: Embassy
text: +5 Cards Discard 3 cards. | When you gain this, each other player gains a Silver.

name: Farmland
text: {2} | When you gain this, trash a card from your hand and gain a nonFarmland card costing exactly (2) more than it.

name: Fool's Gold
text: If this is the first time you played a Fools Gold this turn, +(1), otherwise +(4). | When another player gains a Province, you may trash this from your hand, to gain a Gold onto your deck.

name: Guard Dog
text: +2 Cards If you have 5 or fewer cards in hand, +2 Cards. | When another player plays an Attack, you may first play this from your hand.

name: Haggler
text: +(2) This turn, when you gain a card, if you bought it, gain a cheaper nonVictory card.

name: Highway
text: +1 Card +1 Action This turn, cards cost (1) less.

name: Ill-Gotten Gains
text: (1) You may gain a Copper to your hand. | When you gain this, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Inn
text: +2 Cards +2 Actions Discard 2 cards. | When you gain this, reveal any number of Action cards from your discard pile and shuffle them into your deck.

name: Jack of All Trades
text: Gain a Silver. Look at the top card of your deck; you may discard it. Draw until you have 5 cards in hand. You may trash a nonTreasure card from your hand.

name: Mandarin
text: +(3) Put a card from your hand onto your deck. | When you gain this, put all Treasures you have in play onto your deck in any order.

name: Margrave
text: +3 Cards +1 Buy Each other player draws a card, then discards down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Noble Brigand
text: +(1) Each other player reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, trashes a revealed Silver or Gold you choose, discards the rest, and gains a Copper if they didnt reveal a Treasure. You gain the trashed cards. | When you buy this, do its attack.

name: Nomad Camp
text: +1 Buy +(2) | This is gained onto your deck (instead of to your discard pile).

name: Nomads
text: +1 Buy +(2) | When you gain or trash this, +(2).

name: Oasis
text: +1 Card +1 Action +(1) Discard a card.

name: Oracle
text: Each player (including you) reveals the top 2 cards of their deck, and discards them or puts them back, your choice (they choose the order). Then, +2 Cards.

name: Scheme
text: +1 Card +1 Action This turn, you may put one of your Action cards onto your deck when you discard it from play.

name: Silk Road
text: Worth {1} for every 4 Victory cards you have (round down).

name: Souk
text: +1 Buy +(7) per card in your hand (you cant go below (0)). | When you gain this, trash up to 2 cards from your hand.

name: Spice Merchant
text: You may trash a Treasure from your hand to choose one: +2 Cards and +1 Action; or +1 Buy and +(2).

name: Stables
text: You may discard a Treasure, for +3 Cards and +1 Action.

name: Trader
text: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a Silver per (1) it costs. | When you gain a card, you may reveal this from your hand, to exchange the card for a Silver.

name: Trail
text: +1 Card +1 Action | When you gain, trash, or discard this, other than in Cleanup, you may play it.

name: Tunnel
text: {2} | When you discard this other than during Cleanup, you may reveal it to gain a Gold.

name: Weaver
text: Gain two Silvers or a card costing up to (4). | When you discard this other than in Cleanup, you may play it.

name: Wheelwright
text: +1 Card +1 Action You may discard a card to gain an Action card costing as much as it or less.

name: Witch's Hut
text: +4 Cards Discard 2 cards, revealed. If theyre both Actions, each other player gains a Curse.
